file: 1238_461-Preparation and commercial application of ZHC-01 hydrocracking catalyst.txt

experiments.description: 在CA2中试装置上，使用ZHC-01催化剂，以阿拉伯中质原油的VGO为原料，在模拟140万吨/年工业加氢裂化装置满负荷操作的条件下，进行串联加氢裂化工艺第一阶段的测试。
experiments.text_snippet: the catalyst was tested on the CA2 pilot unit in the first stage of the serially connected hydrocracking process using the VGO derived from the Arabian medium (AM)crude as the feedstock under conditions simulating the fuU load operation of the 1.4 Mt/a hydrocracking unit.

experiments.description: ZHC-01催化剂在中国石化齐鲁分公司140万吨/年工业加氢裂化装置上进行工业应用试验，处理中东含硫VGO、胜利VGO和胜利CGO的混合油，稳定运行41个月。
experiments.text_snippet: The commercial test results showed that the ZHC-01 catalyst, featuring good activity, stability, and flexibility in production, not only could meet the demand for producing environmentally friendly middle distillates, but could also increase the resource of optimized steam cracking feedstock.

Feedstock.value: VGO derived from Arabian medium crude
Feedstock.original: VGO derived from Arabian medium crude

Catalyst composition.value: W/Ni metals on NTY zeolite and amorphous aluminosilicate
Catalyst composition.original: W/Ni metals on NTY zeolite and amorphous aluminosilicate

Product yield.original: {'60% conversion': ['Light naphtha: 4.1%', 'Heavy naphtha: 14.5%', 'Jet fuel: 23.9%', 'Diesel: 16.2%', 'Tail oil: 39.4%'], '65% conversion': ['Light naphtha: 5.7%', 'Heavy naphtha: 17.5%', 'Jet fuel: 25.2%', 'Diesel: 15.6%', 'Tail oil: 33.6%']}

Product Selectivity.original: {'Heavy naphtha': ['Potential aromatic content: 66-65%'], 'Jet fuel': ['Freezing point: < -60°C', 'Smoke point: 24-25 mm', 'Aromatics: 8.8-7.4%'], 'Diesel': ['Freezing point: -6°C to -4°C', 'Cetane number: 64-60'], 'Tail oil': ['BMCI value: 11.6-11.0']}

Catalyst stability.original: Good stability with temperature increase of only 20°C over 41 months of operation

experiments.experiment_description: 在CA2中试装置上，使用ZHC-01催化剂，以阿拉伯中质原油的VGO为原料，在模拟140万吨/年工业加氢裂化装置满负荷操作的条件下，进行串联加氢裂化工艺第一阶段的测试。
experiments.text_snippet: the catalyst was tested on the CA2 pilot unit in the first stage of the serially connected hydrocracking process using the VGO derived from the Arabian medium (AM)crude as the feedstock under conditions simulating the fuU load operation of the 1.4 Mt/a hydrocracking unit.

Catalyst stability.original: Stable operation for 41 months in commercial unit

experiments.experiment_description: ZHC-01催化剂在中国石化齐鲁分公司140万吨/年工业加氢裂化装置上进行工业应用试验，处理中东含硫VGO、胜利VGO和胜利CGO的混合油，稳定运行41个月。
experiments.text_snippet: The commercial test results showed that the ZHC-01 catalyst, featuring good activity, stability, and flexibility in production, not only could meet the demand for producing environmentally friendly middle distillates, but could also increase the resource of optimized steam cracking feedstock.
